mapper.select:
select * from ( SELECT com.id id, com.id companyId, com.company_name companyName, com.province_code provinceCode, com.register_capital registerCapital, com.credit_rating creditRating, com.company_grade companyGrade, com.picc_credit_amount piccCreditAmount, com.credit_days creditDays, com.access_report_flg accessReportFlg, com.on_line_flg onLineFlg, com.actual_guarantee_flg actualGuaranteeFlg, com.created_date createdDate, con.breachDays, con.tradeCount, con.tradeTonnesSell, con.tradeTonnesBuy, con.sellUnitPrice, con.sellTotalAmount, con.buyUnitPrice, con.buyTotalAmount, con.premium, con.grossProfitMargin, con.lastContractTime, con.firstContractTime, if(com.dept_id is not null,com.dept_id,max_con.deptId) deptId, if(max_con.matchUserId is not null,max_con.matchUserId,com.match_user_id) matchUserId FROM t_bs_company com left JOIN ( SELECT SUM(sell.breach_days) breachDays, COUNT(1) tradeCount, SUM(sell.total_number) tradeTonnesSell, SUM(buy.total_number) tradeTonnesBuy, MAX(sell.contract_time) lastContractTime, MIN(sell.contract_time) firstContractTime, SUM(sell.total_amount) / SUM(sell.total_number) sellUnitPrice, SUM(sell.total_amount) sellTotalAmount, sell.company_id companyId, sell.dept_id deptId, SUM(buy.total_amount) / SUM(buy.total_number) buyUnitPrice, SUM(buy.total_amount) buyTotalAmount, SUM(sell.total_amount) / SUM(sell.total_number) - SUM(buy.total_amount) / SUM(buy.total_number) premium, (SUM(sell.total_amount)-SUM(buy.total_amount))/SUM(buy.total_amount) grossProfitMargin FROM t_ctr_contract sell JOIN t_ctr_contract buy ON sell.pair_code = buy.pair_code WHERE sell.contract_status != 'C' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and sell.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY sell.company_id ) con on com.id = con.companyId LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sell.company_id companyId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sell.dept_id ORDER BY sell.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS deptId, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sell.contract_time ORDER BY sell.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS lastContractTime, SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(sell.match_user_id ORDER BY sell.contract_time DESC), ',', 1) AS matchUserId FROM t_ctr_contract sell JOIN t_ctr_contract buy ON buy.pair_code = sell.pair_code WHERE sell.contract_status != 'C' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and sell.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY sell.company_id ) max_con ON con.companyId = max_con.companyId AND con.lastContractTime = max_con.lastContractTime
LEFT JOIN ( SELECT sell.company_id companyId, MiN( sell.contract_time ) firstContractTime FROM t_ctr_contract sell JOIN t_ctr_contract buy ON buy.pair_code = sell.pair_code WHERE sell.contract_status != 'C' AND sell.contract_type = 'S' AND sell.business_type = 'ZY-BB' AND buy.contract_type = 'B' AND buy.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
and sell.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY sell.company_id ) min_con ON con.companyId = min_con.companyId AND con.firstContractTime = min_con.firstContractTime
where com.company_type='I' ) com_result where 1=1
and com_result.deptId in
#{deptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by com_result.lastContractTime desc

select * from ( SELECT com.id id, cbe.id companyId, com.company_name companyName, com.province_code provinceCode, com.register_capital registerCapital, com.credit_rating creditRating, com.company_grade companyGrade, com.picc_credit_amount piccCreditAmount, zhongYin_credit.credit_amount zhongYinCreditAmount, com.credit_days creditDays, com.access_report_flg accessReportFlg, com.on_line_flg onLineFlg, com.actual_guarantee_flg actualGuaranteeFlg, com.created_date createdDate, cbe.breach_days breachDays, cbe.trade_count tradeCount, cbe.trade_tonnes_sell tradeTonnesSell, cbe.trade_tonnes_buy tradeTonnesBuy, cbe.sell_unit_price sellUnitPrice, cbe.sell_total_amount sellTotalAmount, cbe.buy_unit_price buyUnitPrice, cbe.buy_total_amount buyTotalAmount, cbe.premium premium, cbe.gross_profit_margin grossProfitMargin, cbe.last_contract_time lastContractTime, cbe.first_contract_time firstContractTime, cbe.dept_id deptId, cbe.match_user_id matchUserId, cbe.match_user_name matchUserName, com.owner_of_account_id ownerOfAccountId, cbe.common_brand_number commonBrandNumber, cbe.legal_flg legalFlg FROM t_bs_company com LEFT JOIN t_bs_company_credit zhongYin_credit on com.id = zhongYin_credit.company_id and zhongYin_credit.credit_type = '2' LEFT JOIN t_company_business_expansion cbe on com.id = cbe.company_id
where com.company_type='I' AND com.enable_flg = TRUE ) com_result where 1=1
and com_result.deptId in
#{deptIdList[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
order by com_result.lastContractTime desc

SELECT COUNT(1) totalCount,c.company_id companyId,p.brand_number brandNumber,p.product_name productName,p.factory_name factoryName FROM t_ctr_contract c INNER JOIN t_ctr_product p on c.id = p.ctr_contract_id WHERE c.contract_status != 'C' and c.contract_type='S' and c.business_type='ZY-BB'
and b.match_user_id NOT IN
#{notUserIds[${index}],jdbcType=VARCHAR}
GROUP BY c.company_id,p.brand_number ORDER BY c.company_id ASC,COUNT(1) DESC

SELECT COUNT(1) totalCount,com.id companyId FROM t_credit_enterprise_basic_info bas INNER JOIN t_bs_company com ON bas.`name` = com.company_name INNER JOIN t_credit_judicature_case cas on bas.eid = cas.eid GROUP BY bas.name;
